title: tectaria macleanii
intro: Tectaria macleanii, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Tectaria macleanii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, which can help to prevent the spread of infection. Tectaria macleanii is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or tea, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
